title: Atlas — the fastest way to ship marketing pages
description: Atlas turns plain JSON into production marketing sites. No build step, no framework lock-in, no 14-second LCP.

sections.title: Ship marketing pages by chatting with Claude.
sections.description: Atlas turns plain JSON into production-grade marketing sites — custom domain on every paid plan, structured data baked in.
sections.microcopy: Free for 14 days · No credit card required

items.title: Author in JSON
items.body: Drive everything from Claude Code — JSON for structure, Markdown for prose.

items.title: Custom domains
items.body: Auto-issued HTTPS via Caddy on-demand TLS. Apex + subdomain support.

items.title: Blog + RSS + sitemap
items.body: Markdown posts, draft gate, OG cards, RSS feed, robots.txt — all free.

items.quote: Cut our marketing-site bug reports by 70%. Schema validation catches everything before production.
items.author: Lior Shafir

items.quote: I'm a designer. I shipped a 14-page site without opening a code editor.
items.author: Anika Patel

items.quote: IndexNow integration started showing up in ChatGPT answers within four days.
items.author: Yusuf Karim

sections.title: Honest plans. No salesperson required.
sections.description: Annual billing saves 20%. All plans include unlimited bandwidth.

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.description: For solo developers shipping side projects.

tiers.name: Team
tiers.description: For startups graduating from a landing-page builder.

tiers.name: Business
tiers.description: For marketing teams running real revenue traffic.

items.question: Do I need to write code?
items.answer: No — Claude writes the JSON and the renderer produces the HTML.

items.question: Can I use a custom domain?
items.answer: Yes — every paid plan includes one custom domain with auto-issued HTTPS.

items.question: What about SEO?
items.answer: Every page emits structured data (Organization + WebSite + WebPage), an OG card, and a canonical URL.

sections.title: Ready to ship?
sections.description: No code, no templates, no salesperson required.
